devdoc.details: This draft focuses on structure, interfaces, and intended behavior rather than full production functionality.

assignRole(address,string).details: In a complete implementation, role management should use stronger access control.

registerProduct(uint256,string,string,st.details: This function is intended to be called by a producer or manufacturer. It creates the initial provenance record for the product.

transferCustody(uint256,address).details: In a later version, this should include stricter access checks and role validation.

updateProductStatus(uint256,string).details: Example statuses: Created, Shipped, Received, Delivered.

verifyProduct(uint256).details: Consumers, retailers, or regulators can use this function to inspect product information.

stakeholderRoles.details: This is a draft structure and may be expanded later with more robust RBAC.
